tokens.headline: Grow Faster With Virtual Legal Staff
tokens.subtext1: Build your team with the best legal staff in the world.
tokens.subtext2: Choose from pre-vetted candidates вЂ” start in under 3 days.

attempts.prompt: Create a 16:9 aspect ratio immersive brand background. A very light, airy pale-blue-to-white sky gradient, white (#FFFFFF) dominant at top blending into faint blue. Lower portion holds a desaturated, washed-out cityscape silhouette fading into the pale background. Extremely light, high-key, hazy and bright. No text, no logos, high resolution.

You are compositing ONE premium advertising image for a US legal-tech SaaS brand.

You are given a single background image: a finished brand gradient produced in the previous step. Your ONLY job is to place the subject described below onto THAT background and merge the two into one seamless, high-end composition.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
BACKGROUND вЂ” KEEP IT EXACTLY
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
The provided image IS the background. Preserve it exactly as given вЂ” same colours, same gradient, same direction, same composition. Do NOT regenerate, recolour, restyle, re-grade, blur, crop, or replace it, and do NOT add any new scenery, rooms, props, furniture, textures, or environment of your own. The background is final. You are only adding the subject.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
SUBJECT TO ADD
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
A restrained close-up of two hands meeting in a calm handshake, plain navy sleeve and plain white cuff, soft single key light, the rest of the hands and arms dissolving gently into shadow. 90mm macro, f/2.8. Hands centered-low, broad empty space above. Photoreal, matte, premium.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
SEAMLESS MERGE (most important)
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- The subject lives directly on the background with NO card, frame, border, rectangle, panel, Polaroid edge, drop shadow, or hard cut-out line.
- Feather the subject's outer edges softly into the background; let the background's colour and light wrap gently onto the subject's shadow side so the two read as a single photograph, never a paste-up or collage.
- Match the subject's lighting direction, colour temperature, contrast, and grain to the background so nothing looks pasted on.
- Respect the placement noted in the subject and keep the background's open / empty areas clear, so a headline and CTA can be added later.

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
FINISH
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
Premium, editorial, cohesive вЂ” one unified, thumb-stopping composition with a high-end SaaS feel.

No text, no logos, no watermarks, no readable UI, no readable documents, no nameplates, no captions.

diffs.replace: A restrained close-up of two hands meeting in a calm handshake, plain navy sleeve and plain white cuff, soft single key light, the rest of the hands and arms dissolving gently into shadow. 90mm macro, f/2.8. Hands centered-low, broad empty space above. Photoreal, matte, premium.

attempts.prompt:
Add advertisement text overlay to the LEFT side of the provided image. Keep the original image untouched on the right side. Follow these exact specifications:

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
LAYOUT & POSITIONING
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Text block placement: LEFT side of the image (occupy ~40% of total width вЂ” DO NOT exceed)
- Vertical alignment: Centered
- Left margin: ~6% from the left edge
- Right boundary of text: stops at ~42% of total image width
- Top & bottom padding: ~8% each
- Right side: original image fully visible, no overlap

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
TEXT CONTENT
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
1. HEADLINE (bold, punchy):
   "Grow Faster With Virtual Legal Staff"
   - Gradient highlight on: "Virtual Legal Staff"
   - Other words in #0F0F0F
   - Max 4 lines, natural wrapping, no clipping

2. SUPPORTING SUB-TEXT (styled as TWO short value statements, NOT a paragraph):
   Break the message into 2 distinct lines with subtle visual rhythm:
   
   Line 1: "Build your team with the best legal staff in the world."
   Line 2: "Choose from pre-vetted candidates вЂ” start in under 3 days."
   
   - Each line on its own with slightly more line-gap between them than within
   - Color: #0F0F0F at ~85% opacity (slightly softer than headline, gives hierarchy)
   - Line height: 1.5x
   - Optional: add a small thin accent bar/dot (in #85AEFD) before each line, OR a subtle minimalist check icon вЂ” pick whichever feels cleaner. Icons must be SMALL and refined, not chunky.
   - DO NOT render as a flat paragraph block. Treat it like two crisp value props.

3. CTA BUTTON TEXT:
   "Book a Free Consultation  в†’"   (include a small right-arrow at the end inside the button)

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
TYPOGRAPHY
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Font family: "Causten Bold" for headline and CTA
- Sub-text: "Causten Bold" but slightly lighter visual weight via opacity (85%)
- Headline size: moderate вЂ” longest line fits within left 40% with margin
- Sub-text size: ~32% of headline size
- CTA text size: ~38% of headline size
- Line height (headline): 1.1x
- Line height (sub-text): 1.5x
- Letter spacing: normal/tight

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
CTA BUTTON вЂ” PREMIUM SAAS STYLING (CRITICAL)
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Shape: Pill-shaped, fully rounded corners
- Background: Vibrant orange GRADIENT (not flat color)
   в†’ Start: #FF8A3D (lighter orange, top-left)
   в†’ End:   #F26A1A (deeper orange, bottom-right)
   в†’ Direction: diagonal (135В°)
- Subtle inner highlight on top edge (very faint white at low opacity) to add dimension
- Soft drop shadow underneath:
   в†’ Color: orange-tinted shadow (rgba(242, 106, 26, 0.25))
   в†’ Offset: 0px 8px 20px blur
   в†’ Creates a "floating button" premium feel, NOT a harsh black shadow
- Text inside: White (#FFFFFF), Causten Bold, with a small right-arrow "в†’" after the text (same color)
- Padding inside button: ~22px vertical, ~32px horizontal (generous, but compact)
- Button width: hugs the content (text + arrow + padding) вЂ” NOT stretched
- Slight icon/text gap: small space between "Consultation" and "в†’"
- The button should feel CLICKABLE, ELEVATED, and PREMIUM вЂ” like a Stripe, Linear, or Notion CTA button

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
COLOR SPECIFICATIONS
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Primary text: #0F0F0F
- Sub-text: #0F0F0F at 85% opacity
- Accent (small bars/dots before sub-text lines, if used): #85AEFD
- Highlighted headline words ("Virtual Legal Staff"): linear gradient left-to-right
   в†’ Start: #86AFFE
   в†’ End:   #2653AB
- CTA button: orange gradient #FF8A3D в†’ #F26A1A (135В°)
- CTA shadow: rgba(242, 106, 26, 0.25), soft, 0 8px 20px

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
SPACING BETWEEN ELEMENTS
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Headline в†’ Sub-text: comfortable gap (~1.5x sub-text size)
- Sub-text в†’ CTA: generous gap (~2.5x sub-text size) вЂ” CTA must feel like its own confident element, not stuck to the paragraph
- Between sub-text lines: slightly more spacing than default line-height for that "premium breathing room" feel

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
STYLE RULES
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Premium SaaS landing-page aesthetic вЂ” think Stripe, Linear, Webflow
- Sub-text must read as crisp value props, NOT a wall of paragraph text
- CTA must feel elevated, gradient-rich, with soft glow вЂ” not flat
- No element clipped, overlapping, or touching the right image
- No clutter, no decorative noise

в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
DELIVERABLE
в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ
- Final composed advertisement with refined text overlay on LEFT only
- Right-side image untouched
- Original resolution maintained
